niche: personal finance and investing in India — stocks, mutual funds, SIPs, tax, insurance and compounding
audience: Indian retail investors and savers planning their money
topicGuidance: Prefer practical, high-intent topics: SIP and lumpsum strategy, tax-saving, FD/RD vs equity, insurance adequacy, compounding maths, retirement planning. Use accurate FY 2025-26 India context. Avoid hallucinated figures.
